name: Lo-Cal Cheese Cake
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons lemon juice or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Ricotta cheese and egg yolks with Fruit Sweet until smooth.
2. Add the milk, powdered milk, and process until smooth.
3. Stir in the vanilla, lemon juice, and lemon peel until well combined.
4. Beat the egg whites until frothy and fold into the mixture until just blended.
5. Grease a 9-inch springform pan with butter or oleo, then sprinkle graham cracker crumbs evenly throughout.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool completely before serving with your choice of All-Fruit Fanciful preserve.
Variations:
- Use all cottage cheese or all Ricotta cheese.
- For standard cream cheese cake, substitute 24 ounces cream cheese, 3 eggs, 1/2 cup powdered milk, and 2/3 cup Fruit Sweet. Adjust the lemon accordingly.
